title: Evaluation of highly active and stable SiO2 supported Fe-based catalysts for the catalytic methane decomposition into COx free hydrogen and CNTs

review_reason: Original Fe-Mo-MgO methane/acetylene catalytic decomposition study reports catalyst preparation, pressure, feed program, temperature, yield and FW-CNT characterization.
